steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The notes specify that the Great Plains Dinosaur Museum in Malta, Montana houses a dinosaur fossil specimen nicknamed Roberta — the only note that gives an actual nickname for a fossil.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C directly provides the example by stating Roberta is the nickname of a Brachylophosaurus fossil housed at that museum.
The other three either speak only about general facts, omit the nickname, or leave out the specific example.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
